admissions.course_rigor: All of our programs reflect the University’s commitment to experiential education and interdisciplinary coursework and are taught by renowned faculty composed of leaders and visionaries within their respective fields. Drexel has a wide variety of majors and minors that will allow you to explore your individual interests and make an impact in the world around you.

projects_research: Research & Innovation Research & Innovation Institutes & Initiatives Innovation & Entrepreneurship Industry Engagement Global Partnerships

evidence.source_excerpt: A Drexel education will encourage you to explore your interests and allow you to develop your own path. With over 100 majors and as many minors, you're sure to find a program that speaks to you. Through our cross-disciplinary model of learning, you'll also have the opportunity to explore a diverse range of minors outside of your chosen major, allowing you to expand the breadth and depth of your knowledge and get the most from your education. No matter what you choose to study, your classes will be taught by accomplished faculty, many of whom are working professionals teaching in their area of expertise.
